name: Floating Hero
description: Товар парит в воздухе. Динамичная композиция, мелкие частицы, мягкий свет. Современный технологичный стиль.
prompt_prefix: Dynamic product advertising photography. Product floating mid-air. Small floating particles or dust motes catching light. Soft cinematic lighting. Luxury commercial advertising style. Modern technology feeling. Ultra realistic. 8K. Dramatic but clean composition.
composition: Product floating center, slightly angled, particles around, negative space around edges
lighting: Dramatic soft key from top, subtle fill from below, rim light for separation
